message:
feat(engine): add GA evidence package assembly to runtime diagnostics
CLI, expand lowering pipeline, and apply clippy fixes across source

Runtime diagnostics CLI (runtime_diagnostics_cli.rs):
- Add complete GA evidence package data model: GaEvidenceArtifactCategory
  (conformance/performance/security), GaEvidenceArtifactLink,
  GaEvidencePackageInput, GaEvidencePackageMandatoryFieldStatus,
  GaEvidenceRiskDisposition, GaEvidencePackageIndex, and
  GaEvidencePackageOutput
- Implement build_ga_evidence_package(): assembles a consolidated
  evidence package from support bundle, onboarding scorecard, rollout
  decision artifact, external artifact links, and third-party replay
  commands with fail-closed mandatory field validation
- Implement render_ga_evidence_package_summary(): human-readable summary
  for operator review
- Add schema version and failure code constants for GA evidence packages

Runtime diagnostics binary (bin/runtime_diagnostics.rs):
- Add "ga-evidence-package" subcommand with full CLI argument parsing:
  --release-candidate, --workload-id, --package-name, --target-platform,
  --signals, --advisories, --platform-signals, --conformance-artifact,
  --performance-artifact, --security-artifact, --third-party-replay-command,
  plus all existing filter/redaction flags
- Implement run_ga_evidence_package(): orchestrates preflight, scorecard,
  rollout artifact, and GA evidence package assembly with optional file
  materialization and summary rendering
- Add parse_ga_artifact_link() helper for --<category>-artifact flags
  with optional ::description suffix
- Add write_json_file() helper for structured artifact output
- Refactor write_support_bundle_files() to delegate to new generic
  write_materialized_files() function

Lowering pipeline (lowering_pipeline.rs):
- Major expansion with new lowering pass infrastructure

Source fixes across crates:
- benchmark_e2e.rs: fix assert_eq!(x.starts_with(...), true) clippy lint
  to use assert!(x.starts_with(...))
- capability.rs: remove unused import
- capability_token.rs: fix clippy lint
- causal_regret_evidence_gate.rs: fix assertions and test structure
- closure_model.rs: fix clippy lints
- conformance_vector_gen.rs: fix test assertions
- counterexample_synthesizer.rs: fix clippy lint
- franken-extension-host/lib.rs: fix import ordering

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
